parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to your request that will be used for idempotency

name.description: Name of the invoice (often an internal ID code from the merchant’s systems).

amount.description: Amount to be paid. Maximum 4 decimal places supported as per ISO 4217.
Amount is zero or a positive number representing the tax included in the amount.

rate.description: Rate is a percentage (0 to 100) representing the rate of tax included in the amount.

currency.description: Currency for payment of the invoice, in ISO 4217 format (for example, USD). Must be a valid ISO 4217 currency code with 3 characters

order_id.description: Your unique identifier for the order associated with this invoice. This field is displayed in the Dashboard and ProcessOut uses it to deduplicate invoices and transactions.

customer_id.description:
**_Resource expandable_**
Customer linked to the invoice (generally the one making the purchase).

verification.description: Tags an invoice to be used as an verification invoice. When this is set to true, we will attempt to automatically utilise the lowest amount applicable for a given PSP & Currency. Otherwise, we will default to utilising the invoice amount provided.

auto_capture_at.description: Optional if you want us to auto capture for you. Expected value is a date and time in ISO 8601 format.

details.description: Details of the items or products that are being purchased.

name.description:
Name of the item or product, which represents an item on a receipt.
_Maximum 80 characters long_

amount.description: Amount charged for this item or product.

type.description:
Item or product type. Set this to anything suitable.
_Maximum 30 characters long_

quantity.description: Quantity of the item or product. Default value is 0.

metadata.description: Metadata related to the invoice detail, in the form of key-value pairs (string - string).

category.description: Category of the item or product. Can be `food`, `entertainment`, `home`, `appliance`, `bidding`, `gift`, `technology`, `media`, `communication`, `health`, `sport`, `personal-service`, `professional-service`, `clothing`, `travel`, `tickets`, `transport` or `other`.

reference.description:
Reference of the item or product.
_Maximum 255 characters long_

description.description:
Description of the item or product.
_Maximum 255 characters long_

brand.description:
Brand of the item or product.
_Maximum 80 characters long_

model.description:
Model of the item or product.
_Maximum 80 characters long_

discount_amount.description: Discount amount (when the discount is listed as a separate item on a receipt).

condition.description: Condition of the product. Can be `new`, `refurbished`, `used` or `other`.

marketplace_merchant.description: Marketplace merchant ID of the item or product.

marketplace_merchant_is_business.description: Denotes whether or not the marketplace merchant is a business.

marketplace_merchant_created_at.description:
Date and time when the merchant was created.
_RFC1123 date or timestamp_

score.description:
Scoring of the invoice. No validation done on this field because it is used to forward risk information to compatible payment providers.
_Maximum 12 characters long_

is_legit.description: Denotes whether or not the invoice is legitimate.

skip_gateway_rules.description: Flag to skip payment gateway fraud engine rules. (This is only available on certain compatible gateways. Contact us for more information.)

device.description: Information about the device and channel used by the customer to initiate the payment.

id.description:
ID of the device. This can be anything but would usually be a UUID generated by a third-party anti-fraud solution.
_Maximum 100 characters long_

channel.description: Channel used by the device. Must be `web`, `ios`, `android` or `other`. Note: Please only set this field to `ios` or `android` if you are utilising our mobile SDKs.

ip_address.description:
IP address of the device.
_Must be a valid IP address_

external_fraud_tools.description: Information to forward to external fraud tools.

forter.description: Information for the Forter fraud prevention service.

signifyd.description: Information for the Signifyd fraud prevention service.

ravelin.description: Information for the Ravelin fraud prevention service.

address1.description:
First line of the delivery address.
_Maximum 255 characters long_

address2.description:
Second line of the delivery address.
_Maximum 255 characters long_

state.description:
State or county of the delivery address.
_Maximum 80 characters long_

city.description:
City of the delivery address.
_Maximum 80 characters long_

country_code.description:
Country code (`US`, `FR`...) of the delivery address.
_Must be a valid ISO 3166 country code with 2 characters_

zip.description:
ZIP code of the delivery address.
_Maximum 16 characters long_

phone_number.description: Phone number of the shipment recipient

expects_shipping_at.description:
Expected date of delivery.
_RFC1123 date or timestamp_

relay_store_name.description:
Name of the store that the order must be collected from.
_Maximum 100 characters long_

email.description:
Shipping email address.
_Must be a valid email_

first_name.description:
First name of the shipping address.
_Maximum 80 characters long_

last_name.description:
Last name of the shipping address.
_Maximum 80 characters long_

billing.description: Billing information for the invoice. This address will be used to populate the Customer and Card address if empty.

address1.description:
First line of the billing address.
_Maximum 255 characters long_

address2.description:
Second line of the billing address.
_Maximum 255 characters long_

state.description:
State or county of the billing address.
_Maximum 80 characters long_

city.description:
City of the billing address.
_Maximum 80 characters long_

zip.description:
ZIP code of the address.
_Maximum 16 characters long_

statement_descriptor.description:
Item that will be listed for this purchase on the customer’s bank statement.
_Maximum 25 characters long, should only contain letters, numbers, spaces, dots, asterisks and forward slashes_

statement_descriptor_phone.description: Support phone number for this purchase on the customer’s bank statement.

statement_descriptor_city.description: City shown for this purchase on the customer’s bank statement. Maximum 22 characters long. Should only contain letters and numbers.

statement_descriptor_company.description: Your company name to show on the customer’s bank statement.

statement_descriptor_url.description: Support URL for this purchase on the customer’s bank statement.

initiation_type.description:
Represent the initiation type of the transaction which can be Customer Initiated Transaction (`cit`) or Merchant Initiated Transaction (`mit`).
_Allowed values are: `cit` or `mit`_

payment_intent.description:
The type of payment flow that generated the transaction.
_Allowed values are: `one-off`, `recurring`, `recurring-standing-order`, `recurring-subscription`, `installment`, `unscheduled`, `unscheduled-delayed-charge`, `unscheduled-resubmission`, `unscheduled-no-show` or `unscheduled-reauthorization`_.

This field should be used in combination with the `initiation_type` field to tag scenarios such as initial CIT of a recurring sequence.

payment_type.description:
Optional information about the payment type
_Allowed values are “moto” or “ecommerce”_

return_url.description:
For [APMs](../docs/alternative-payment-methods), this is the URL to return to the app after payment is accepted.
_Must be a valid URL_

webhook_url.description:
Custom [webhook](/webhooks) URL for this purchase.
_Must be a valid URL_

sca_exemption_reason.description:
Optional reason for requesting SCA exemption (Note: This must also be supported by the PSP. Please contact us for more information.)
_Allowed values are: `low-value`, `trusted-beneficiary` or `transaction-risk-analysis`_

challenge_indicator.description:
Optional challenge indicator field when requesting 3DS2 (Note: This must also be supported by the PSP. Please contact us for more information.)
_Allowed values are: `no-preference`, `no-challenge-requested`, `challenge-requested`, `challenge-requested-mandate`, `no-challenge-requested-tra-performed`, `no-challenge-requested-data-share-only`, `no-challenge-requested-sca-performed`, `no-challenge-requested-whitelist-exemption`, `challenge-requested-whitelist-prompt` or `cb-scoring`_

unsupported_feature_bypass.description: Bypass payment provider unsupported features set in the transaction

incremental_authorization.description: Ignore incremental authorization requests on PSP that do not support it

metadata.description: Custom key/value pair (string/string) metadata that can be used to identify the transaction. This information is passed to upstream payment providers that support similar metadata objects. Do not include personal data in this field.

gateway_data.description:
Used for custom logics / data sent to payment providers.
This field is not standard across providers.

    "test-proj_gAO1Uu0ysZJvDuUpOGPkUBeE3pGalk3x", 
    "key_sandbox_mah31RDFqcDxmaS7MvhDbJfDJvjtsFTB")

    "test-proj_gAO1Uu0ysZJvDuUpOGPkUBeE3pGalk3x",

))->fetchTransactions();
